description: Java entity class representing supporting document metadata, persisted in a relational database, with annotations for ORM mapping using Jakarta Persistence (JPA). It includes properties such as identifiers, filenames, content metadata, storage details, and creation timestamp.

classes.name: SupportingDocument
classes.description: Entity class mapping to 'supporting_document' table storing metadata about uploaded supporting documents.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the supporting document.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the supporting document.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the document.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with the document.

methods.name: getLoanDraftId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the associated loan draft, if any.

methods.name: setLoanDraftId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the associated loan draft.

methods.name: getOriginalFilename
methods.description: Returns the original filename of the uploaded document.

methods.name: setOriginalFilename
methods.description: Sets the original filename of the uploaded document.

methods.name: getContentType
methods.description: Returns the MIME content type of the document.

methods.name: setContentType
methods.description: Sets the MIME content type of the document.

methods.name: getSizeBytes
methods.description: Returns the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: setSizeBytes
methods.description: Sets the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: getSha256Hex
methods.description: Returns the SHA-256 hash of the document content in hex.

methods.name: setSha256Hex
methods.description: Sets the SHA-256 hash of the document content.

methods.name: getStorageKey
methods.description: Returns the storage key referencing the document in external storage.

methods.name: setStorageKey
methods.description: Sets the storage key referencing the document in external storage.

methods.name: getMetadata
methods.description: Returns JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: setMetadata
methods.description: Sets JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the document record was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the document record was created.
